name: Feature request

## Feature request

**What problem does this solve?**
**Proposed solution:**
**Which layer / module does it touch?** (data / discovery / construction / validation /
combination / portfolio / execution / monitoring)
**Data contracts affected:** (any new or changed Pydantic schema?)
**Alternatives considered:**
**Definition of done:** (what tests prove it works?)
